assignments.description: assign the AA Names to Text Var for display in screen
assignments.name: Assign_AA_Name
assignments.label: Assign AA Name

assignments.description: assign the Count of Alternative Answers to the cur Response
assignments.name: Assign_AltAnswer_Count
assignments.label: Assign AltAnswer Count

assignments.description: assign a child response record as an 'alternate question' in order to be published by the Content Team in order to update the parent response
assignments.name: Assign_Child_Response_Values
assignments.label: Assign Child Response Values

assignments.description: assign a child response record as an 'alternate question' in order to be published by the Content Team in order to update the parent response
assignments.name: Assign_Child_Response_Values_0
assignments.label: Assign Child Response Values

assignments.description: assign common values to new Response Audit Log variable
assignments.name: Assign_NewRAL_Common
assignments.label: Assign NewRAL Common

assignments.description: assign new Response Audit Log values
assignments.name: Assign_NewRAL_Revisions
assignments.label: Assign NewRAL Revisions

assignments.description: assign new Response Audit Log values
assignments.name: Assign_NewRAL_Revisions_0
assignments.label: Assign NewRAL Revisions

assignments.description: assign values to update the response
assignments.name: Assign_Response_Values
assignments.label: Assign Response Values

assignments.description: assign values to update the response
assignments.name: Assign_Response_Values_0
assignments.label: Assign Response Values

decisions.description: check to see if there are any alternative answers
decisions.name: Check_for_Alternative_Answers
decisions.label: Check for Alternative Answers

Flow.description: Approval Process for out of cycle updates to response answer 10.26 - Updates for the new Response review process

formulas.description: dynamic text for single or multiple alternative answers
formulas.name: fAATitle
formulas.expression: IF({!nAAcount} > 1 , "This Response has "+ TEXT({!nAAcount}) +" Alternative Answers. Please make sure to review these as well." , "This Response has 1 Alternative Answer. Please make sure to review this as well.")

formulas.description: the name of the current Content Reviewer for display
formulas.name: fContentReviewer

formulas.description: version number for the new response audit log
formulas.name: fRALVersion

formulas.description: dynamic value for the new Response Audit Log Review Result field
formulas.name: fReviewResult

Flow.interviewLabel: Content Review - Out of Cycle Approval {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Content Review - Out of Cycle Approval

loops.description: loop the alternative answers in the flow
loops.name: AA_Loop
loops.label: AA Loop

recordCreates.description: creates a child response record as an 'alternate question' in order to be published by the Content Team in order to update the parent response
recordCreates.name: Create_Child_Response
recordCreates.label: Create Child Response

recordLookups.description: get the alternative answers related to the Response
recordLookups.name: Alternative_Answers
recordLookups.label: Alternative Answers

recordLookups.description: get the current Response record details
recordLookups.name: Cur_Response
recordLookups.label: Cur Response

recordUpdates.description: update the revised answer on the response record
recordUpdates.name: Update_Response
recordUpdates.label: Update Response

fields.name: dtxtAuthentication
fields.fieldText:
Content Review

Out of Cycle


This Response is currently in review.


Please confirm that you are {!Cur_Response.Reviewer__r.FirstName} {!Cur_Response.Reviewer__r.LastName} or an approved delegate to review the Response.

fields.name: dtxtErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong with this flow.


Your admin has received an email about this error.

fields.name: dtxtReviewDecision
fields.fieldText:
Content Review

Out of Cycle

fields.name: dtxtContentDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Question: {!Cur_Response.avnio__PrimaryQuestion__c}

  • Last Edited By: {!Response_Audit_Log.Reviewed_By__r.FirstName} {!Response_Audit_Log.Reviewed_By__r.LastName}
  • Last Edited Date: {!Response_Audit_Log.CreatedDate}

fields.name: Revise_Current_Version
fields.helpText: Mark 'Yes' if the Current Version requires revision

fields.name: dtxtRevision
fields.fieldText:
Revised Version

Use the space below to revise the current answer

fields.name: dtxt
fields.fieldText:
Current Version


{!Response_Audit_Log.Revised_Version__c}

fields.name: dtxtAA
fields.fieldText:
{!fAATitle}


{!tAANames}

textTemplates.name: EmailTemplate_ReviewComplete
textTemplates.text:
Attention Lauren & Jo,


{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} has completed the Out-of-Cycle review for {!Cur_Response.Name}. Click here to view the updated version.

variables.description: count of Project Questions that were created after the Response was last edited
variables.name: nPQcount

variables.description: the names of the AA records that are related to the cur Response
variables.name: tAANames

variables.description: child response record as an 'alternate question' in order to be published by the Content Team in order to update the parent response
variables.name: vChildResponse

variables.description: record variable for new Response Audit Log
variables.name: vNewRAL
